title: Redis Server Info
description: Key metrics from the Redis INFO command, covering server, clients, memory, persistence, replication, and stats sections.

uptime_in_seconds.description: Number of seconds since server start.

connected_clients.description: Number of client connections (excluding replica connections).

used_memory.description: Total bytes allocated by Redis using its allocator.

maxmemory.description: Maximum memory configured. 0 means no limit.

maxmemory_policy.description: Eviction policy when maxmemory is reached.

rdb_last_save_time.description: Unix timestamp of last successful RDB save.

aof_enabled.description: Whether AOF persistence is enabled (1) or disabled (0).

total_commands_processed.description: Total number of commands processed since server start.

total_connections_received.description: Total connections accepted since server start.

expired_keys.description: Total number of key expiration events.

evicted_keys.description: Number of keys evicted due to maxmemory policy.
